title: Noah Lucas homepage v026 current-content liquid glass and AI route
changeSummary: Rebases the liquid-glass work onto the promoted v023 homepage content instead of the stale staging shell.
Makes Contact use the same section-body/text-row-list grammar as Operating Principles while preserving Get in Touch and LinkedIn actions.
Makes Impact triggers match employer pane-cta buttons and rounds CTA corners.
Promotes nl-refractive-sampler, SVG displacement, material tuning, pointer variables, and mobile/reduced-motion fallbacks on current homepage content.
Updates /AI copy and keeps /AI on the same noahlucas.com shell, glass pane, feed band, hgl sections, work-card model, and CTA system.

validation.method: Static validation only. The in-app Browser rejected file:// automation via URL policy, and no local server was started per user instruction.
validation.flowUnderTest: current v023 homepage shell rebased with v026 liquid glass -> /AI generated from same shell -> staging and production pointer artifacts updated.
checks: Homepage source is rebased from promoted v023 content, removing the stale contact paragraph and stale arrow CTA copy from the older staging shell.
Contact section uses section-body text-row-list contact-actions, matching the operating-principles section body grammar while keeping contact CTAs.
Impact trigger and employer CTAs share pane-cta typography, min-height, border, fill, and 14px radius.
Homepage keeps nl-refractive-sampler on feed band and product-executive hero.
/AI copy updates the hero line to Install the operating system for business operations and expands the operating-system content.
/AI keeps nl-refractive-sampler on feed band, hero, and Nightly Operating Brief card.

supersedesReason: v026 preserves the current live content while applying the requested liquid-glass design upgrades and /AI route work.

aiRoute.status: static-route-promoted-in-assets-repo; Squarespace route still requires page/bootstrap support if serving under noahlucas.com/AI
